entries.reason: no changes found against base branch
gate impl bootstrapping problem: sdd-forge binary uses main repo code, not worktree code, so it cannot see uncommitted worktree changes via git diff HEAD (new behavior)
entries.trigger: sdd-forge flow run gate --phase impl fails with 'no changes found against base branch'
entries.resolution: run gate using node src/flow.js from worktree to use the fixed code, which can see uncommitted changes via git diff HEAD
entries.guardrailCandidate: when the fix itself changes gate-impl behavior, gate cannot self-verify without committing first — consider noting this in flow-impl skill
